content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Remediated both pending nearby-work amendments in `src/cli/project.rs`. Direct dependency/dependent fallback status now trusts refreshed detail first, then the focal bead relation status, and only then stale `br list` summary status, so transient detail refresh failures no longer let terminal summaries erase direct Nearby work. Sibling and related-work prefetch selection now considers summary and relation terminal statuses before spending bounded detail-refresh budget, reserving refresh scans for nominally active candidates and preventing known closed/deferred candidates from crowding out later entries. Added focused regressions for direct stale-summary fallback and summary-terminal sibling/related prefetch filtering.

## Steps

0. [Completed] Inspected nearby-context construction, direct relation rendering, sibling/related prefetch candidate selection, and existing nearby-work tests.
1. [Completed] Updated direct relation status precedence so missing detail refresh falls back to relation status before summary status, while loaded detail remains authoritative.
2. [Completed] Updated sibling and related-work prefetch filtering to pass summary/relation status into the terminal-status filter before consuming bounded refresh scan slots.
3. [Completed] Added and updated focused regression tests for stale terminal summaries on direct relations and terminal summary candidates in sibling/related prefetch lists.
4. [Completed] Ran focused tests plus repository formatting, linting, full test, Nix build, and whitespace validation gates.

## Validation Evidence

- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub direct_relation_fallback_prefers_relation_status_over_stale_summary --lib` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub nearby_related_work_prefetch_candidates_skip_summary_terminal_entries --lib` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub nearby_summary_sibling_detail_candidates_include_summary_inferred_siblings --lib` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo fmt --check` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub` passed.
- `nix build` passed.
- `git diff --check` passed.

## Outstanding Risks

None identified.
